name: context7
title: Context7
description: Search Context7 libraries and browse documentation context from Raycast
author: loris

preferences.name: apiKey
preferences.title: Context7 API Key
preferences.description: API key used to authenticate requests against Context7

commands.name: search-libraries
commands.title: Search Libraries
commands.description: Search Context7 libraries and manage favorites

commands.name: search-documentation
commands.title: Search Documentation
commands.description: Search documentation inside a Context7 library

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
